use_cases: Displaying placeholder content while data is being fetched to improve perceived loading performance
Providing visual feedback during async operations in content grids
Maintaining layout stability during page transitions or data loading
ai_summary: An animated loading skeleton component that displays a responsive grid of placeholder cards with continuous shimmer-style animations. Uses Framer Motion for smooth, organic movement and includes dynamic grid configuration that adapts column counts based on viewport width. Best used as a loading state placeholder to improve user experience during data fetching operations.
